Address: Akhaliya Circle, Opposite Raja Motors, Pratap Nagar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342003
Functionality description: International franchise gym (now under Cult.fit India) offering comprehensive strength training, cardio, Zumba, aerobics, and 108+ fitness activities. Features AC, music system, showers, locker rooms, changing rooms (separate for men and women), valet parking, TV, rubber flooring, and medical kit. Open Mon–Sat 6 AM–10 PM, Sun 8 AM–12 PM.
insights: Established in Jodhpur in 2015 as part of the Gold's Gym India franchise (now owned by Cult.fit after Feb 2022 acquisition). One of India's most recognized fitness brand names with 140+ outlets across 90+ cities. Reviews are mixed — praised for equipment quality and brand recognition, but criticized for trainer attentiveness and management attitude. Rated 3.9/5 on Google with 230 reviews. Listed as 'closed down' on Justdial, possibly rebranded or relocated.

Address: 3rd A Road, Sardarpura, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: Premium unisex gym in Sardarpura with modern, high-standard equipment. Offers personalized workout programs for both beginners and advanced fitness enthusiasts. Key trainer Suraj Sir known for knowledgeable and supportive guidance. Maintains high hygiene standards throughout. Morning (6 AM–1 PM) and evening (5–9:45 PM) sessions, Mon–Sat.
insights: Consistently holds a perfect 5.0-star rating on Google with 200 reviews — among the highest-rated gyms in Jodhpur. Located in the prime Sardarpura commercial area, attracting urban professionals and students. Members frequently highlight the welcoming onboarding process and top-tier machine quality. Strong reputation for motivating environment and hands-on trainer support.

Address: 6-A, New Power House Road, near Deora Hyundai, Sector-H, Shastri Nagar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342003
Functionality description: Spacious, well-lit multi-purpose fitness center offering weight training, cardio, CrossFit, personal training, bodybuilding, and IFBB-level competition coaching. Known for state-of-the-art equipment across a massive floor area. Open 7 days (Mon–Sat 6 AM–10 PM, Sun 8 AM–12 PM). Trainers include Adil Sir and Vicky Bhaiya with expert knowledge in nutrition and bodybuilding techniques.
insights: One of Jodhpur's most established gyms with a dedicated community of 10,687+ Facebook followers. Owner Adil Khan (known as 'Aadil Sir') is a renowned fitness professional in the city. Rated 4.5/5 on Google with 278 reviews. Coaches IFBB professional aspirants. Tagline: 'A name in itself — bodies are not trained, they are sculpted here.' Reviews highlight outstanding trainer knowledge, though some complaints about over-emphasis on personal training upselling.

Address: Plot 28, 2nd Floor, Krishi Mandi Circle, above ICICI Bank, near Reliance Fresh, Maderana Colony, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: Fully air-conditioned unisex gym with 24-hour biometric access. Specializes in weight training for fat loss and mass gain. Offers steam bath, zero-gravity massage, locker facilities, personalized diet and workout plans, CCTV security, WiFi, and an on-site supplement store. Two branches in Jodhpur (Maderana Colony and Paota). Serves all fitness levels from beginners to advanced athletes.
insights: Nationally awarded 'Best Gym With Outstanding Results' (2018) and 'Best Gym With Outstanding Ambiance' (2020). Trainer Dhruv Tak won 'Best Fitness Trainer in Jodhpur' award (2020) presented by actor Vidyut Jamwal. Membership starts at ₹499/month. Over 500 Google reviews with consistent 4.9-star rating. Popular with international travellers visiting Jodhpur. Day-pass available at ₹200.

Address: 117/4 Yes Bank Basement, Bhairav Circle, Ratanada, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342003
Functionality description: Community-focused fitness center offering CrossFit, Pilates, Hyrox, Functional Training, Kickboxing, Olympic Lifting, Powerlifting, and Strength Training. Houses Jodhpur's only dedicated Pilates studio led by certified instructor Pritika Solanki. Provides 2-day free trial. Membership available on monthly, quarterly, half-yearly, and yearly basis.
insights: Ranked #1 gym in Jodhpur by ThreeBestRated.in. Organizes outdoor activities including hiking, trekking, cycling and boot camps for members. Strong community culture with members of all ages. Pilates program is unique in the city. Over 587 Google reviews. Trainer Mayank Singh has helped members achieve significant fat loss and muscle gain transformations.

Address: 3rd Floor, GK Tower, Gaurav Path, Opposite Discom Sub Station, Ratanada Circle, Ratanada, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342011
Functionality description: International 24/7 gym franchise with state-of-the-art equipment for strength training, cardio, and functional workouts. Smart key access system allows entry anytime. Modern machines, air-conditioned facility, clean changing rooms and showers. Key trainers: Seema Ma'am, Sunil Sir, Tejpal Sir. Worldwide membership access to 5,500+ Anytime Fitness clubs globally.
insights: Part of the world's largest gym franchise network (5,500+ clubs in 50 countries). Jodhpur franchise estimated to have opened around 2020. Mixed reviews: praised for hygiene, equipment, and dedicated trainers; some complaints about pushy sales tactics. Membership grants global access. International brand presence adds credibility. Over 573 Google reviews.

Address: 1st Polo Ship House Road, Opposite Marudhar Hospital, Paota, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: Premium fitness studio with state-of-the-art equipment and dedicated training zones for weight training, strength training, and customized muscle-building sessions. Offers tailored routines for weight loss, lean muscle building, and body sculpting. Certified and experienced trainers lead all sessions. Inclusive for beginners and advanced athletes.
insights: Multi-branch gym chain with locations in Lal Sagar, Laxminagar, Circuit House, and Paota (premium branch). Special discounts offered for women members. Active in fitness championships and body transformation competitions. Nutrition supplement guidance provided. 4.9-star Google rating with 171 reviews. One of the most modern fitness facilities in western Jodhpur.

Address: Vijay Nagar, Basni, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342005
Functionality description: Well-equipped gym catering to both men and women. Services include bodybuilding, weight training, cardio exercises, group fitness classes, personalized fitness training, and nutrition counseling. Operates double shifts (5 AM–12 PM and 5–10 PM, Mon–Sat). Maintains a healthy, disciplinary, and friendly environment.
insights: Established in 2018, quickly became the go-to fitness destination in the Basni industrial area. Consistently earns 4.9-star ratings with 343 Google reviews. Certified trainers for both genders. Strong local reputation for equipment quality and trainer attentiveness. Popular with working professionals in the Basni MIA zone.

Address: Rajmata Krishna Kumari Road, behind Lalji Handicrafts, Rai Ka Bagh, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342006
Functionality description: Full-service gym offering strength training, cardio, and group fitness classes. Modern and well-maintained equipment available for all fitness levels. Convenient morning (5:30 AM–12 PM) and evening (4–10:30 PM) sessions. Clean and welcoming atmosphere with professional staff.
insights: Boutique gym in the Rai Ka Bagh locality with a highly personal approach. Owner is noted for being genuinely caring about members' fitness journeys. Popular with both local residents and tourists/travellers from abroad. Praised by visitors from Australia as the best gym in Jodhpur. 4.9-star Google rating with 26 reviews.

Address: Near Moti Mahal, Bhaskar Circle, Shakti Colony, Ratanada, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342011
Functionality description: Full-service fitness studio with top-notch equipment in a spacious, clean environment. Offers diverse training programs for all fitness levels. Trainer Vishal provides motivating and knowledgeable guidance. Morning (6–11 AM) and evening (4–9 PM) batches available, Monday to Saturday.
insights: Well-established gym in the Ratanada locality with 261 Google reviews and 4.8-star rating. Predominantly positive reviews, though some complaints have been raised about membership fee disputes and trainer behavior. Widely recognized for state-of-the-art equipment and cleanliness. Trainer Vishal is frequently highlighted in reviews.

Address: Plot No. 91, near Bodhi International School, Tirupati Vihar, Shikargarh Enclave, Shikargad, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: Premium fitness center focusing on overall fitness and agility. Specializes in Personal Training, Functional Training, CrossFit, and Cardio Workouts. High standards of hygiene and professional training environment. Trainers provide attention and guidance to all members, even those without personal training subscriptions. Morning (5–11 AM) and evening (4–9 PM) sessions.
insights: One of the top-rated gyms in Jodhpur with 325 Google reviews and 4.9-star rating. Premium ambiance with world-class equipment and luxurious feel. Known as 'The BIG Daddy of Fitness' per its brand tagline. Trainers are experienced and highly responsive to member needs. Serves a fitness-conscious clientele in the Shikargarh/Shikargad area of eastern Jodhpur.

Address: A-60, near National Handloom, Pratap Nagar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: Centralized AC gym with certified trainers, 4000 sq. ft. of gym area, advanced and fully-equipped with a full range of cardio and strength equipment. Marketed as Jodhpur's No.1 Gym and Fitness Centre. Also operates a large gym equipment manufacturing and wholesale showroom — the biggest in Rajasthan — with 100+ treadmill models on display. Open Mon–Sat 5 AM–10 PM, Sun 9 AM–5 PM.
insights: Unique dual-role business: operates both as a gym and as one of India's leading gym equipment manufacturers. Supplies equipment to gyms across India. Trusted by gym owners for build quality and pricing. 4.4-star Google rating with 173 reviews. Located in Pratap Nagar, serving the western part of Jodhpur. Strong reputation in the fitness industry beyond just being a gym.

Address: Plot No. 8, behind Mahaveer Complex, front lane of Bheru Bagh Jain Temple, Sardarpura, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: World-class training facility in the prime Sardarpura area offering gym workouts, cardio, weight training, HIIT, and more. Suitable for both complete beginners and advanced fitness enthusiasts. Personalized fitness guidance provided by well-trained professionals. Focuses on overall fitness and wellness, not just muscle-building. Morning (5:30–11 AM) and evening (5–9 PM) batches.
insights: Premium fitness center in Sardarpura locality catering to young urban professionals. Known for quick and visible results under expert trainers. Community of health-conscious members. Though newer with fewer reviews (5.0 star), it is gaining traction among fitness enthusiasts looking for a world-class facility in central Jodhpur. Part of FITPASS network enabling flexible gym access.

Address: 30, New Power House Road, near SIS Security, Sector-H, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: Multi-branch unisex fitness center specializing in calisthenics, CrossFit, body transformation, Zumba, and strength training. Full BMI and body assessment on joining, personalized diet consultations, and tailored training programs. Branches across Ratanada, Bhaskar Circle, Chopasni Road, Sardarpura, Shastri Nagar, and more. Morning (6 AM–12 PM) and evening (4–9:30 PM) batches, Mon–Sat.
insights: Ranked as the most reviewed gym in Jodhpur by a local fitness blog. Trainers Bhupender Sir and Sweta Ma'am are frequently praised for exceptional personalized attention. 4.6/5 on Google with 317 reviews. Offers spa treatments, Pilates, and meditation programs in addition to conventional training. Strong multi-branch presence across the city. Registered on IndiaMART as a fitness service provider.

Address: 240, Azad Hind Market, Baldev Nagar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342003
Functionality description: Affordable, well-equipped gym offering personalized training, diet and supplement consultation, cardio, and strength machines. Caters to men and women. Morning (5:30–10 AM) and evening (4:30–10 PM) sessions, Mon–Sat. Protein shakes and extra nutritional items available on-site. Trainer gives individual attention and depth-level knowledge of exercises.
insights: Known for its low-cost yet high-value offering. 4.7/5 Google rating with 121 reviews. Popular in the Baldev Nagar/Azad Hind Market area. Trainer is known for pushing members to exceed their perceived limits. One of the few gyms in the area that combines affordability with quality equipment and professional nutritional guidance.

Address: 54, near Apex School, Mahaveer Nagar, Basni, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342005
Functionality description: Full-service gym with an extensive cardio section featuring treadmills, stationary bikes, and ellipticals. Comprehensive weight training area. Highly supportive training staff focused on fat loss and body transformation. Morning (4:30–11:30 AM) and evening (4–9 PM) sessions, Mon–Sat.
insights: Prominent gym in the Mahaveer Nagar, Basni area. 4.6/5 Google rating with 336 reviews. Documented results include a member who lost 15 kg in 4 months. Known as a 'beacon of fitness prowess' in the area. Praised for staff friendliness and a welcoming atmosphere. One of Jodhpur's older establishments — operating since ~2014. Serves the industrial Basni locality effectively.

Address: Building No. 57, Shree Krishna Nagar, Sector-23, near Krishna Super Speciality Hospital, Chopasni Housing Board, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342008
Functionality description: Premium multi-floor fitness club offering CrossFit, strength training, cardio, personal training, and open-air workout zones. Features world-class equipment, AC, steam room, professional trainers including Vaibhav Solanki and Saurabh, rubber flooring, and a motivating interior design. Open Mon–Sat 6 AM–12 PM and 4–10 PM. Has a dedicated website at powerclub.co.in.
insights: Founded by Mr. Raj, a fitness visionary credited with influencing Jodhpur's fitness culture. Trainer Vaibhav Solanki is a standout personal trainer who delivers physical and mental transformation results. Rated 4.5/5 on Google with 299 reviews. Steam facility available. Known for a high-energy vibe, world-class equipment, and elite trainer network. Members have travelled from Dubai and other cities specifically to train here.

Address: Above LMJ Bajaj, Defence Lab Road, Near Ratanada Circle, Ratanada, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: Multi-level premium fitness facility specialising in Cardio, Strength Training, Boxing, CrossFit, MMA, and Yoga. Spread across 3 floors, all kept clean. Operates two daily sessions (5:30–11:30 AM and 5–10 PM, Mon–Sat; 7–10 AM Sunday). Features boxing equipment in addition to full gym gear. Ample car parking available outside the premises.
insights: Rated 4.8/5 on Google with 114 reviews and 4.8/5 on Justdial with 123 reviews — one of Ratanada's highest-rated gyms. Praised by international visitors as 'truly the best gym in Jodhpur.' Multi-floor layout with a trademark of exceptional cleanliness. Trainer Ratan Choudhary mentioned by name in visitor reviews. Hosts yoga sessions for flexibility and mindfulness alongside conventional training. Established ~2019.

Address: Baba Ramdev Road, Masuria Road, near Rotary School, Shramikpura, Baldev Nagar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342003
Functionality description: Well-equipped gym in the Masuria/Baldev Nagar area offering weight training, bodybuilding, cardio, personal training, and group fitness programs. Double daily sessions (5:30 AM–12 PM and 4–11 PM, Mon–Sat). Excellent ambiance with top-quality equipment. Focuses on long-term fitness goals and overall body transformation.
insights: Outstanding 4.9/5 Google rating with 279 reviews — among the top-rated gyms in west Jodhpur. Head trainer Shahrukh is consistently praised as the best trainer members have experienced across multiple gyms. Strong community of members achieving transformations. Popular in the Masuria Road/Baldev Nagar locality, which serves as a key residential hub for working-class Jodhpur.

Address: Kudi Bhagtasni Housing Board, Basni, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342005
Functionality description: Local gym serving the Kudi Bhagtasni Housing Board community. Offers complete weight training and bodybuilding equipment. Two daily sessions: morning (5:30 AM–12 PM) and evening (4–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Owner Murali Choudhary doubles as the head trainer and is personally involved with every member's progress.
insights: Highly rated at 4.9/5 on Google with 29 reviews. Owner-trainer Murali Choudhary is praised warmly by members for his hands-on training approach. Minor ventilation issue noted in early reviews but equipment and machines are well-maintained. A trusted neighbourhood gym in the Kudi Bhagtasni area, complementing the broader Basni fitness cluster.

Address: B-6, Senapati Bhawan, opposite Sabji Mandi Road, Prajapat Colony, Ratanada, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342011
Functionality description: Boutique unisex fitness studio blending gym workouts with yoga, aerial yoga, and stretching/toning programs. Offers weight training, cardio, personal training, diet planning, and advanced Aerial Yoga. Trainer Mr. Puspendra provides personalized guidance. Morning (6 AM–1:30 PM) and evening (4:30–9:30 PM) sessions Mon–Sat. Also known as 'Encore Fitness by Ria'.
insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 81 reviews — a rare achievement. Owner Ria Ma'am is a certified trainer celebrated for kindness, approachability, and expert form correction. The gym is unique in Ratanada for offering aerial yoga alongside conventional gym services. Members describe it as feeling like a 'second home.' The blend of fitness and wellness disciplines differentiates it from all other gyms in the city.

Address: Kudi Bhagtasni Housing Board, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342016
Functionality description: Nutrition-first fitness and wellness club operating under the Herbalife franchise model. Offers daily group fitness sessions (6 AM–9 PM, 7 days a week), personalised nutrition coaching, meal plans, and weight management programs using Herbalife products. Emphasis on sustainable healthy lifestyle change rather than just gym workouts. Coach Dilip leads all sessions.
insights: Exceptional 4.9/5 Google rating with 399 reviews — one of the highest review counts in Jodhpur's fitness category. Coach Dilip is consistently praised for producing real weight-loss results (e.g., member lost 4 kg after joining). Unique positioning as a nutrition + fitness hybrid club makes it stand out from conventional gyms. Open 7 days a week, which is rare among Jodhpur fitness centres. Serves the Kudi Bhagtasni community extensively.

Address: Plot No. 929, 9th E Road, Sardarpura, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: Premium black-aesthetic gym with world-class equipment in the heart of Sardarpura. Services include weight training, cardio, personal training, steam room, and highly personalised fitness programs. Open Mon–Sat 6 AM–10 PM. Trainer Sunil Prajapat specialises in senior fitness and age-specific flexibility programs. Trainer Rakesh Kumar Prajapati also leads personalised sessions.
insights: Rated 4.5/5 on Google with 108 reviews. Distinctive black-themed decor creates a premium, motivating atmosphere. Attracts international members from Dubai and overseas. Standout case: trainer Sunil Prajapat trained a 73-year-old member for 4 months with outstanding flexibility results — demonstrating exceptional trainer adaptability. Steam room included. One of two Power Club branches in Jodhpur, demonstrating brand expansion in the city.

Address: Keshavnagar, Chopasni Housing Board, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342008
Functionality description: Full-service unisex fitness center and yoga studio offering gym workouts, yoga, CrossFit-style training, and personalised fitness & diet programs. Certified trainers Umesh Sir and Yashwant Sir lead sessions. Features top-quality, well-maintained machines in a spacious, hygienic facility. Open Mon–Sat 5:30 AM–10 PM. Also registered as a sports school and sports complex.
insights: Outstanding 4.9/5 Google rating with 446 reviews — one of the highest review counts among all Jodhpur gyms. Members describe an 'amazing,' welcoming atmosphere with a strong sense of fitness community. Owner and trainers are consistently praised as knowledgeable, friendly and supportive. Customised workout and diet plans for all goals (weight loss, muscle gain, overall fitness). Serves the growing Chopasni Housing Board residential zone in southwest Jodhpur.

Address: EC-5, Electronic Complex, near Steel Bhawan, opposite Fresh & Green Restaurant, Sector G, Shastri Nagar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342003
Functionality description: High-energy, well-lit full-service gym in Shastri Nagar. Offers weight training, HIIT, yoga, cardio, and personal training. Known for exceptional interior lighting that creates a motivating workout atmosphere. Double daily sessions (5–11 AM and 5–11 PM, Mon–Sat). Trainer Hasam is a standout personal trainer frequently cited in reviews. Clean, spacious, and well-maintained equipment.
insights: Solid 4.8/5 Google rating with 400 reviews — among the highest review volumes in Jodhpur. Gym's distinctive lighting setup is frequently mentioned as a key differentiator. Trainer Hasam receives exceptional praise for his knowledge, support, and ability to produce measurable physical and mental results. Strong member retention and a highly motivated community. Central Shastri Nagar location makes it accessible for a wide catchment area.

Address: 214, Vijay Nagar Road, near Hari Om Nagar, Hari Om Nagar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342014
Functionality description: Modern fitness centre and sports school in Hari Om Nagar offering weight training, cardio, personal training, and goal-oriented transformation programmes. Trainer Piyush leads customised sessions with a focus on visible results within 30 days. Morning (6–11 AM) and evening (5–10 PM) batches, Mon–Sat. Clean facility with up-to-date, well-serviced machines.
insights: Impressive 4.9/5 Google rating with 232 reviews. Trainer Piyush has a documented track record — members report achieving weight-loss goals they had previously thought unattainable. Located in the Hari Om Nagar/Vijay Nagar Road area on the western fringe of Jodhpur. Registered as both a fitness centre and a sports school, indicating a formal accreditation. Strong vibe described as 'serious yet friendly' by multiple reviewers.

Address: 9-12, Golf Course Scheme Road, Abhaygarh Colony, Air Force Area, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342011
Functionality description: Jodhpur's only dedicated calisthenics and bodyweight-training centre. Coaches Parminder Sir and Sneha Ma'am lead structured programmes covering skill progressions, strength development, and body dynamics. Morning (7–8:30 AM) and evening (4–8:30 PM) sessions, Mon–Sat. Provides customised fitness trackers, form correction, and beginner-to-advanced skill pathways. Clean, safe environment with hygienic toilet facilities.
insights: Unique positioning as Jodhpur's ONLY calisthenics facility — completely unmatched niche with no direct competitor in the city. 4.9/5 Google rating with 128 reviews. Coaches are described as 'truly dedicated mentors' with deep knowledge of body dynamics. Attracts members from other states. Members report joining for bodyweight work but gaining far broader fitness knowledge. Tagline: 'The only place to grow as a calisthenics athlete in Jodhpur.'

Address: 13, Opposite Victorian Palace, AIIMS Road, Pal Road, near ALLEN, Shobhawaton ki Dhani, Khema-Ka-Kuwa, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: Spacious premium gym on AIIMS Road (Pal Road) with LA Fitness-grade equipment. Offers weight training, bodybuilding, cardio, personal training, and diet consultation. Owner-trainer Sanjay Gehlot is personally involved with members. Two daily sessions: morning (6–10 AM) and evening (5–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Features a huge training area, ideal for athletes and serious fitness enthusiasts.
insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 31 reviews. Equipment quality compared by members to LA Fitness in the USA — a remarkable benchmark for a Jodhpur gym. Owner Sanjay Gehlot is praised by name for his friendly nature, training approach, and genuine care for clients. Located near AIIMS Jodhpur, attracting medical students, faculty, and healthcare professionals. Rapidly growing reputation in the southern expansion zone of Jodhpur along Pal Road.

Address: B-215, Saraswati Nagar, Basni, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342005
Functionality description: Community-driven fitness club in Saraswati Nagar, Basni. Head trainers Karan and Nirmal are certified and highly qualified. Offers weight training, cardio, personal training, and exclusive weekend group activities that foster community bonds. Two daily sessions: morning (5:30 AM–12 PM) and evening (4–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Focuses on consistent motivation and inclusive fitness culture.
insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 55 reviews. Unique differentiator: organises structured weekend community activities — turning it from a gym into a fitness community. Trainers Karan and Nirmal are praised not just for technical expertise but for creating a motivating, non-judgmental environment. Located in Saraswati Nagar, Basni — part of the densely populated southern Jodhpur cluster. Members who describe themselves as 'lazy' credit this gym for making them consistent.

Address: 2nd Floor, Moti Mahal Tower, 10th B Road, near Children Park, Sardarpura, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001
Functionality description: Multi-purpose fitness centre and sports club on the 2nd floor of Moti Mahal Tower, Sardarpura. Offers gym workouts, strength training, cardio, personal training, and steam bath facilities. Open 7 days (Mon–Sat 6 AM–10 PM, Sun 6 AM–2 PM). Functions as a registered fitness centre, sports club, and educational institution for fitness coaching. Trainers provide personalised attention to beginners and regulars alike.
insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 81 reviews. Prime location in Sardarpura — one of Jodhpur's busiest commercial zones — near a children's park. Registered as a sports club and educational institution in addition to a gym, indicating structured fitness coaching. Steam bath available. Some negative reviews cite steam bath being out of order and older equipment in certain areas. Competes directly with Build-X Gym and Sky Fit Gym in the Sardarpura cluster.

Address: Matki Chouraha, BJS Colony, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342006
Functionality description: Premium, meticulously designed unisex gym in the BJS Colony / Paota area. Features top-notch equipment, a suavely designed interior, disciplined crowd management, and highly experienced trainers. Open 7 days a week (5:30 AM–10 PM). Trainer Brijesh Kashyap provides personalised attention to every member regardless of their plan. Focuses on bodybuilding, strength training, and form-perfect technique.
insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 49 reviews. Trainer Brijesh Ji Kashyap stands out as the defining personality of this gym — members emphasise that he goes beyond his role to correct form for all members, not just personal training clients. Members describe it as having the 'best ambience you could ever get in a gym.' Open every day of the week, including Sundays — rare among Jodhpur gyms. Located near BJS Colony in the Paota cluster, serving Paota and surrounding areas.
